items.title: Bulls guarantee 26-27 salary for Leonard Miller
items.author: NBC Sports
items.body_excerpt: Bulls guarantee 26-27 salary for Leonard Miller NBC Sports

items.title: The Chicago Bulls will fully guarantee the $2.41 million salary of Leonard Miller for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Miller averaged 11.7 points on 55.5% shooting from the field with 5.8 rebounds in 27 games, including 12 starts, for Chicago last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Chicago Bulls will fully guarantee the $2.41 million salary of Leonard Miller for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Miller averaged 11.7 points on 55.5% shooting from the field with 5.8 rebounds in 27 games, including 12 starts, for Chicago last season.
